title: Oregon DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Oregon DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (OR DHS DDS), confirmed Job Profile codes (Disability Analyst 1 = 5926, Disability Analyst 2 = 5927, Disability Analysis and Adjudication Manager 3 = 7193) with official DAS class-page URLs, ESTIMATED salary ranges (the DAS portal is interactive with no machine-readable schedule), SEIU 503 / OPEU DHS Coalition CBA context, and data gaps. Companion to OR/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Oregon Department of Administrative Services (DAS) / SEIU 503 (OPEU); OR DHS Disability Determination Services
source.title: OR DDS salary research notes (DAS class codes confirmed; salaries estimated via ZipRecruiter)

notes: Computed: class codes (5926/5927/7193) are confirmed against official OR DAS class-profile URLs, but the salary figures are ZipRecruiter market estimates — the DAS Classification & Compensation portal is interactive-only with no static machine-readable pay band, so scheduled ranges/steps were not retrieved. SEIU 503 / OPEU DHS Coalition CBA (2023-2025; 2025-2027 in negotiation).
